caption:
To more breakfast dates this 2025! ☕️☕️

Featured in this reel are some of the Dubai breakfast spots we tried last year:
• Al Khayma Heritage Restaurant 
• La Brasserie at The Raining Street 
• Resorts World One cruise 
• Lavash
• 21 Grams
• Mazmi Cafe

What should be on our list this year? Drop your recommendations! ❤️
